goal: Remove multi-second Files ancestor-click stalls while preserving locked Layout V1, exact Trail authority, bounded I/O, and lossless client controls.

ontology.type: cross-client-server input latency and file-manager I/O dependency graph

components.name: unix_stdin_reader_loop
components.role: Frames raw terminal bytes and blocking-sends them to the dedicated bounded input lane.

components.name: ClientEventReceivers input/ordered/semantic lanes
components.role: Separates input-first bounded events, ordered lossless server control, and a capacity-one latest semantic FrameData mailbox.

components.name: run_client_loop
components.role: Uses a 32-input fairness quantum, forwards exact input, and presents only the newest pending complete semantic frame.

components.name: HeadlessServer event loop
components.role: Consumes the bounded server event channel and serially dispatches input, scheduled work, and render.

components.name: handle_file_manager_row_mouse
components.role: Plain left-down revalidates exact directory identity and submits a cloned state to the bounded FM worker without filesystem reads.

components.name: TrailSnapshots::select_dir
components.role: Clones an exact resident col+1 snapshot; only a nonresident branch reads, and plain-left dispatch executes that branch on the worker.

components.name: install_trail_operation_projection
components.role: Installs operation compatibility state from prepared resident Trail snapshots without re-reading child, parent, preview, or writability.

components.name: FileManagerIoWorker
components.role: Already provides one executing plus one latest pending request and generation-bound result delivery.

components.name: ClientWriterQueue
components.role: Keeps reliable controls plus at most one replaceable render before socket writing.

components.name: Files Layout V1 visual suite
components.role: Must remain unchanged after performance-only V1.x work.

claims.text: Client and server captured 7411 identical ordered raw input events; the defect is delay, not byte loss.
Multi-second server silences begin after left-down and align with synchronous Trail child, parent, and preview filesystem work.
Server render queue_full is zero and measured render work is tens of milliseconds, not the observed 7-10 seconds.
Input, ordered control, and complete semantic frames now use separate lanes; only semantic FrameData coalesces and a 32-input quantum preserves fairness.
Directory listing prepares entry metadata and names, not recursive file bodies; preview content is separately bounded.
Resident activation is disk-free, nonresident activation uses the bounded worker, and semantic frames become latest-only without dropping ordered controls.
